allow: Bash(pnpm --filter @smart-bursary/web add @tanstack/react-table @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu @radix-ui/react-popover @radix-ui/react-label @radix-ui/react-checkbox @radix-ui/react-tabs @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-accordion @radix-ui/react-separator @radix-ui/react-scroll-area date-fns react-day-picker cmdk vaul tailwindcss-animate)
